judgment.summary: Robust growth and exceptional profitability are supported by a massive cash reserve.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 5.11 beat the 2.67 estimate by 91.6%, with the next earnings date set for 2026-07-23.
positives: Earnings growth of 82.0% reflects significant upward momentum.
Profit margin of 37.9% demonstrates strong bottom-line efficiency.
Total cash of $126.84B provides a massive liquidity cushion.
Return on equity of 38.9% shows excellent capital efficiency.
Analyst consensus is a strong_buy from 52 analysts.
negatives: Price/Book of 10.04 indicates a high premium relative to book value.
Beta of 1.27 suggests higher price volatility than the market average.
Trailing P/E of 30.27 represents a relatively high valuation multiple.

news.paragraph: Alphabet is experiencing conflicting institutional moves, as Berkshire Hathaway increased its stake while Pershing Square and Stanley Druckenmiller have reduced or exited their positions. Despite this, analysts at Oppenheimer and Loop Capital have significantly raised their price targets, with Loop Capital projecting a target of $490. Traders should also weigh the broader industry trend of accelerating AI revenue growth as a potential driver for the stock.
